LanguageData.Thought_EffectRadio.stages.0.description: 我有点喜欢正在播放的音乐，尽管信号很糟糕。
LanguageData.Thought_EffectRadio.stages.0.label: 环境音乐
LanguageData.Thought_EffectRadio.stages.1.description: 我喜欢播放的音乐，非常平静。
LanguageData.Thought_EffectRadio.stages.1.label: 环境音乐
LanguageData.VCEF_FishingThought.stages.0.description: 没有什么比钓鱼更放松的了
LanguageData.VCEF_FishingThought.stages.0.label: 放松的钓鱼活动
LanguageData.VEE_Aurora.stages.0.label: 美丽的极光
LanguageData.VEE_Hail.stages.0.label: 被冰雹击中
LanguageData.VFE_ArchotechSculptureImprint.stages.0.d: archotech雕塑让我不断地看到一件美丽的艺术品。这让我放松。
LanguageData.VFES_FreshAir.stages.0.description: 感觉空气清新，味道好闻！
LanguageData.VFES_FreshAir.stages.0.label: 干净的空气
LanguageData.Chemshined.stages.0.description: 我感到精力充沛，我着火了，见证我吧！
LanguageData.Chemshined.stages.0.label: 化学发光
LanguageData.Storefront_HadToWait.stages.0.descriptio: I had to wait long in the store.
LanguageData.Storefront_HadToWait.stages.0.label: had to wait to be served
LanguageData.Storefront_Serviced.stages.0.label: awful service
LanguageData.Storefront_Serviced.stages.1.label: bad service
LanguageData.Storefront_Serviced.stages.2.label: decent service
LanguageData.Storefront_Serviced.stages.3.label: good service
LanguageData.Storefront_Serviced.stages.4.label: excellent service
LanguageData.Storefront_ServicedMood.stages.0.label: had awful service
LanguageData.Storefront_ServicedMood.stages.1.label: had bad service
LanguageData.Storefront_ServicedMood.stages.2.label: had decent service
LanguageData.Storefront_ServicedMood.stages.3.label: had good service
LanguageData.Storefront_ServicedMood.stages.4.label: had excellent service
